node.statement: E3 (right, h_{a,a}∘(b∘a) term). h_{a,a}=a^2-P(a^2) in Ker P (def square-hole). Apply GT-onehole-52 (eq 5.2: ||P(h_{r,s}∘(t∘u))||<=C sqrt(eta)||r||||s||||t||||u||) with r=s=a, t=b, u=a, so h_{r,s}=h_{a,a}: ||P(h_{a,a}∘(b∘a))||<=C sqrt(eta)||a||·||a||·||b||·||a||=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. CONCLUSION: ||P(h_{a,a}∘(b∘a))||<=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. Uses GT-onehole-52, def square-hole.
